element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Required to reach new areas and access optional content
Scattered across large environments for player collection
Open area design contrasts with linear progression in other Batman Returns versions

typical_relief_triggers: Progression gates unlocked by grappling gun
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Action-adventure pacing with exploration intervals between combat sequences; large environments allow player-controlled tempo

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Power-ups and collectibles hidden throughout large environments; grappling gun gates reveal optional exploration areas

notable_level_patterns.description: Genesis version features spacious areas for exploration and power-up collection, distinguishing it from more linear versions on other platforms
Grappling gun serves as progression gate, unlocking new areas and creating structured advancement through otherwise open spaces
Combines beat 'em up combat with exploration and environmental puzzle-solving through tool acquisition

sources_used: wikipedia - List of video games featuring Batman
data_quality_note: T3 tier - Limited source material available. Wikipedia entry provides feature overview but lacks detailed level-by-level breakdown, exact enemy introduction sequencing, specific tension cycle timing, or comprehensive spatial design documentation. Extraction based on gameplay feature descriptions only.
